name: ~Destiny’s Final Stop, Azure dragon of Finality~
description:
May the Rembrance’s gaze shine upon the astral express

See you tomorrow friend

This world will be...Ḁ̶̰͙̟̗͌̎͊͠s̵̠̼̯̼̈̍̾ ̸͕̐w̴̨͇͛̍̌̍͆e̵̱̞̅̇̀̑͝ͅ’̸̨̜̺͕̒̍̕v̴͈̋̅̏è̷̯͂̒͆̕ ̷̛̣͖̦́̐̏͝w̷͓̪͛͑̈͗r̴̳̪̥̙͍͑̽i̴̩͔̥̯͚͆̏t̸̛̛͖͖̘͌̐͑t̵͇̱́̊͆̄́e̶̻̠̭̦̋̑n̶̺̲̂ ̴̪́

F̶̩̩̘͗͂̇̓́a̵͕͆̔ȑ̵̫̎́͠͝ę̴͍̟̼̹̔w̸̝͇͇̺̃̑͌̑ė̴̢͓̭͇l̵̬͙̂l̸̨̜̱̲̋̓͐̔̚ ̴̝̺̎̀̾̈̿N̵̝͎͍͍͛͜ẽ̷̲̤̞̆̈́̿ṳ̷̪̃͋̓͜͠v̸̞̺͌i̸̧̖̖̤͖͑͠ļ̷̲̈́́̏̈́l̸̯̠̱̈́͗e̵̲͑t̴͉̞̼͌̇̿̄ṭ̵̘͇͙̰̓̏E

(Your the trailblazer, And With Amphoreus over...Your Path to Edo star is changed)

Ok, So as someone who doesn’t play Genshin, I don’t know that Mych about the lore, So If I get something wrong please tell me RESPECTFULLY!!! Im only a Hsr Player after all😭😭😭😭😭😭
